beats.action: Morning light filters through soot. Kaelen traces boundary lines on a makeshift stone table map. Renna watches from the threshold, hand near her belt.
beats.camera: Wide shot establishing the Ashfall Wastes, slowly pushing into a medium shot of Kaelen and Renna.

beats.action: Renna crosses her arms, looking at Kaelen.

dialogue.text: They closed the gates to the upper terrace. The traditionalists. They won't even hear your name without reaching for their hilts.

beats.action: Kaelen, without looking up, continues tracing the map with his finger.
beats.camera: Close-up on Kaelen's hand tracing the map, then pulling back slightly to include his face in profile.

dialogue.text: They value their lineage. They think in terms of centuries, not immediate survival. It makes their movements entirely predictable.

beats.action: Renna steps closer to the table, emphasizing her point with a slight gesture.
beats.camera: Medium shot, slightly over Kaelen's shoulder, focusing on Renna as she approaches.

dialogue.text: They think you're a butcher, Kaelen. You took down the local strongman with poison and shadows. To them, you have no honor. You can't just slide a blade into an entire council.

beats.action: Kaelen sets down a small, tarnished copper token (a guild seal) onto the map.
beats.camera: Close-up on the token as it lands on the map, then slowly pans up to Kaelen's face.

beats.action: Kaelen gestures subtly towards the map with the token.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, slight Dutch tilt.

dialogue.text: I have no intention of killing them. If I destroy the council, the district's trade network collapses, rendering the conquest useless. I require their infrastructure intact.

beats.action: Renna shakes her head, looking away briefly then back at Kaelen.

dialogue.text: Then you're stuck. They'd rather starve than deal with an upstart.

beats.action: Kaelen looks directly at Renna, his gaze measured and cold.
beats.camera: Two-shot, over Renna's shoulder looking at Kaelen, then a slight push in on Kaelen.

dialogue.text: They will deal with me because I have already secured their supply lines. I redirected the morning shipment of spirit-stone ore. It currently sits in our storehouses.

beats.action: Renna stiffens, her eyes widening slightly as the realization hits her.
Renna lowers her voice, looking around nervously.

dialogue.text: You hijacked the ore? If they find out—

beats.action: Kaelen gives a faint, cold smile, then gestures dismissively.

dialogue.text: They will not find out. I will present it to them as a gesture of goodwill—a 'recovery' of lost cargo from bandits. I will ask for nothing in return but an advisory seat.

beats.action: Renna shakes her head slowly, a wary understanding dawning on her face.

dialogue.text: An advisory seat. Once you're in the room, you'll start pulling the strings.

beats.action: Kaelen returns his gaze to the map, a detached look on his face. He taps the map with a finger.
beats.camera: Medium close-up on Kaelen, slowly pulling back to show him at the map.

dialogue.text: Precisely. They keep their pride, and I acquire their network. A hammer only shatters. A lever moves the world.

beats.action: Renna watches Kaelen, a chill running down her spine as she processes his words.

expression.renna_ashfall_scavenger: chilled, awed by his cunning, slightly fearful

beats.camera: Close-up on Renna's face, a slow push in.
